Description: "Registered Group schema in ReportModule to resolve UnknownDependenciesException"
Instruction: "Import Group and GroupSchema. Add it to MongooseModule.forFeature inside ReportModule."

Description: "Included _id in getPanels return mapping in panels.service.ts"
Instruction: "Map _id in the returned array of getPanels in panels.service.ts"
ReplacementContent:
"    return panels.map((panel) => ({
      _id: (panel as any)._id.toString(),
      name: panel.name,
      price: panel.price,
      estimatedTime: panel.estimatedTime,
      tests: panel.tests,
      mainHeading: panel.mainHeading,
      subheadings: panel.subheadings || [],
      testSubheadings: panel.testSubheadings || {},
      method: panel.method,
      specimen: panel.specimen,
    }));"
TargetContent:
"    return panels.map((panel) => ({
      name: panel.name,
      price: panel.price,
      estimatedTime: panel.estimatedTime,
      tests: panel.tests,
      mainHeading: panel.mainHeading,
      subheadings: panel.subheadings || [],
      testSubheadings: panel.testSubheadings || {},
      method: panel.method,
      specimen: panel.specimen,
    }));"
